text.title: Django Coding Practices Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml for practices-django-coding.

conclusion.verdict: wrap flow in transaction.atomic; service function holds the boundary
add select_related (FK) / prefetch_related (M2M) on the queryset
extract logic to model method or service; keep view thin
split into base/dev/prod; secrets to env vars

text.example: write_path && multi_table=true → wrap CheckoutService.create in transaction.atomic; view stays thin and delegates. Rule: atomic-writes.
